What We Do

QA Solutions Built for Modern Software

From AI-powered test automation to intelligent customer support, Qignite brings next-generation quality engineering to your product lifecycle.

Core Service

AI-Powered QA Automation

Leverage intelligent testing systems that learn, adapt, and evolve with your codebase — dramatically reducing manual effort while increasing coverage and accuracy.

  • Self-healing test scripts
  • Intelligent bug pattern recognition
  • Automated regression suites
  • Visual regression testing
  • AI-generated test cases
Learn More
Specialized

Healthcare Platform QA

Specialized quality assurance for healthcare systems and digital pathology platforms, ensuring compliance, reliability, and patient data integrity across international markets.

  • HIPAA compliance validation
  • Digital pathology platform testing
  • EHR system integration testing
  • Clinical workflow validation
  • Regulatory compliance checks
Learn More
AI Service

AI-Assisted Customer Support

Deploy intelligent support agents that resolve issues faster, reduce ticket volume, and deliver consistent, accurate responses — available around the clock.

  • LLM-powered support bots
  • Intelligent ticket routing
  • Knowledge base automation
  • Multi-channel support integration
  • Sentiment analysis & escalation
Learn More
Enterprise

Enterprise QA Engineering

End-to-end quality engineering for enterprise platforms. From strategy to execution, we embed quality into every phase of your software development lifecycle.

  • QA strategy & process design
  • CI/CD pipeline integration
  • Performance & load testing
  • Security & penetration testing
  • QA team augmentation
Learn More
View All Services →
Our Mission

Quality is not optional. It's the foundation.

We believe great software starts with rigorous quality assurance. At Qignite, we combine proven QA practices with cutting-edge AI tools — so your products are built right, shipped fast, and trusted at scale.

Our Story →
AI-Powered TestingHealthcare QAEnterprise GradeInternational Markets24/7 AI SupportCI/CD Integration
The People

Built by Experts

A team of QA engineers and AI specialists passionate about shipping software that works.

CEO

Umair Nadeem

Chief Executive Officer

As CEO of Qignite, I built the company on one core principle: quality is not optional, it's the foundation. With expertise in QA Engineering and AI-powered quality assurance, I lead a team focused on delivering reliable, scalable, and top-notch digital products with confidence. At Qignite, we combine traditional QA practices with modern AI tools to create smarter testing workflows, faster delivery cycles, and products users can actually trust. Our mission is simple: build high-quality software through precision, automation, and innovation.

"Quality. Intelligence. Confidence."

View on Upwork
COO

Faisal Amin

Chief Operating Officer

As COO of Qignite, Faisal Amin drives the operational engine behind the company's vision, ensuring every project moves with precision, speed, and accountability. With a strong focus on execution, process optimization, and team coordination, he plays a key role in transforming ideas into scalable, high-quality digital solutions. Faisal specializes in building streamlined workflows that bridge technology, quality assurance, and client success.

"Operational Excellence. Scalable Systems. Reliable Delivery."

Managing Director

Awais Shah

Managing Director & QA Lead

As Managing Director at Qignite, Awais Shah plays a central role in shaping the company's operational direction while maintaining a strong focus on software quality and delivery excellence. With a background rooted in Quality Assurance, he brings a disciplined and detail-oriented approach to managing projects, teams, and client expectations. Awais combines leadership with technical insight, ensuring that every product reflects reliability, performance, and user trust.

"Leadership Through Quality. Execution With Precision."
